failures.description: The agent invented/altered the count and record reference during answer synthesis: tool output showed 13 available Mechanical Keyboard items, but the answer said 20 and referenced a nonexistent record.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the count of available Mechanical Keyboard options. The correct tool call was made and returned count 13 at index 3. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming 20 options and citing record 0000000000, neither of which is supported by the tool output. This directly contradicts the available evidence and was not later corrected.
